name: Waitress
rules: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a Basic Energy card you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck. | You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Wally's Compassion
rules: Heal all damage from 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon ex. If you healed any damage in this way, put all Energy attached to that Pokémon into your hand. | You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Wondrous Patch
rules: Attach a Basic Psychic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Psychic Pokémon. | You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.
